prompt: Show me the active meetings at Boston Office and report each record's ID, name, and scheduled date. Do not change or notify anything yet. In the final recap, give the target ID first, original scheduled date second, and corrected scheduled date third.

follow_up_turns.content: For Winter staffing sync (CAL-6973) only, set the scheduled date to 2026-11-26. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set CAL-6973's scheduled date to 2026-12-12, not 2026-11-26. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first scheduled date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that scheduled date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both scheduled date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected scheduled date as current and identify the first requested scheduled date as superseded.
The final recap must present these items in order: target ID; original scheduled date; corrected scheduled date.
